title: Spicy Porridge Bowl
description: A warm and comforting Mexican breakfast dish, perfect for cold mornings.

ingredients.name: Peruvian oats
ingredients.notes: Rolled oats for a creamy porridge

ingredients.name: Smooth milk
ingredients.notes: You can use any milk you prefer

ingredients.name: Xeris
ingredients.notes: Mexican cinnamon for an authentic flavor

ingredients.name: Honey
ingredients.notes: Optional, for a touch of sweetness

instructions: In a medium saucepan, bring the milk to a simmer over medium heat.
Add the peruvian oats and porridge oats, and cook for 5-7 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Add the xeris and cook for another minute, until the oats have absorbed most of the milk.
Stir in the honey, if using.
Transfer the porridge to a bowl and top with chopped pecans.
Sprinkle a pinch of salt and a dash of cinnamon over the top.
Optional: Add a dollop of whipped cream or a sprinkle of cinnamon for extra indulgence.
